title: Idhayam indha idhayam Lyrics Billa 2 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Idhayam indha idhayam
Singers: Shweta Pandit
Movie: Billa 2
Lyrics : Na MuthuKumar
Music : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Idhayam indha idhayam
innum ethanai inbangal thaangidimo
Idhayam indha idhayam
innum ethanai thunbangal thaangidimo

Aasai thundilil maatikondu
ithu thathalithu thudikirathe
Kaayam yaavaiyum thetri kondu
idhu marupadiyum ninaikiradhe

Ullukule thudikum siru idhayam
ethnaiyo kadalai idhu vilungum

Vendum vendum endru ketkaiyile
vendaam vendaam endru sollume
vendaam vendaam endru vilagi ninral
vendum vendum enru thullume..

Idhu thavithidum nerupa?
illai kulirnthidum neera?
ithu pani aeri malai ya?
idhai arinthor yaarumillai
ullathile arai undu vaasal illai
ulle vandhen un ninaivo thirumbavillai

Thoongum podhum idhu thudithidume
aengum podho ithu vedikkum
Theendum viral endru therindha pinbum
vendum endre idhu nadikkum

Ithu kadavulin pilaiya?
illai padaithavan kodaiya?
kelvi illaa vidaiya?
ithai arinthor yaarumillai
idhayam ellai endral enna nadakum .
kaneer ennam vaarthaiyai maari izhakkum

Idhayam indha idhayam
innum ethanai inbangal thaangidimo
Idhayam indha idhayam
innum ethanai thunbangal thaangidimo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Idhayam indha idhayam expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Billa 2, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic feelings.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Shweta Pandit, known for her melodious voice and expressive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Idhayam indha idhayam was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his innovative sound in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 2012 as part of the movie Billa 2.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhayam indha idhayam, the protagonist expresses his deep feelings of love and longing, encapsulated in the beautiful lyrics by Na Muthukumar. The song's romantic and melancholic mood resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love. Set against the backdrop of Billa 2, it serves as a poignant reminder of the emotional struggles faced in relationships. With Shweta Pandit's captivating voice and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this melody evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhayam indha idhayam from Billa 2 is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Shweta Pandit's enchanting vocals and Yuvan Shankar Raja's soulful composition, this song takes you on an emotional journey. Experience the heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar that beautifully express the complexities of love.
stanzaMeanings: How many more sorrows can this heart bear? How many more troubles can this heart endure?
With desires in my heart, this is just the beginning of my journey. It keeps thinking about the past with all its memories.
Inside, a small heart beats, how many waves can it handle?
When asked for what is needed, it says no, it doesn't want it. Even if it stands saying it wants, it still jumps around saying it wants.
Is this a burning fire? Or is it the cool water? Is this the mist rising? No one knows this, there is a half inside, there is no door. I have come inside, your thoughts do not return.
When it sleeps, it wakes up everywhere. When it wakes up, it knows it is a finger. It wants to know what it is.
Is this the child of God? Or is it the creation of the creator? Is there no question or answer? No one knows this, if the heart has limits, what will happen? Tears will change the words.
How many more sorrows can this heart bear? How many more troubles can this heart endure.
